title: lasianthaea calva
intro: Lasianthaea calva is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Lasianthaea calva include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease. The herbal preparations of Lasianthaea calva typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
